description: Python virtual environment used by the collateral extractor pipeline.
Derived local HTML inspection page for one durable source/work record.
Deterministic local-search-projection.v1 JSON artifact emitted from reviewed durable records for one visibility profile.
SQLite FTS5 search index built from one local-search projection profile without raw payload or full-text retention.
Read-only local-search-results.v1 JSON emitted from a temporary query over a local search projection index.
Machine-readable contract describing the query and projection expectations for each static page family, including sparse state and public/private field separation.
Dry-run refetch plan derived from durable source/work metadata; no network fetch is attempted.
Checked request payload describing proposed network actions, allowlist, budgets, robots posture, and dirty-worktree policy before any live executor runs.
Machine-readable allow, dry-run, or refuse report emitted by the shared network safety gate evaluator without performing network access.
Human-readable text report emitted by a local diagnostic or gate tool for operator review.
Explicit audited suppressions for scanner false positives, keyed by finding code, path glob, substring match, reason, and approver.
Machine-readable leak-scan-report.v1 output describing active findings, suppressed findings, and allowlist audit details for one scanned directory.
Checked-in contract describing the required delimiters, metadata fields, separator, and instruction-negation guidance for untrusted source text in LLM prompts.
Prompt fixture JSON documenting one prompt text plus the wrapped hostile source blocks it is expected to contain.
Source-adapter manifest binding one source corpus to one workspace with locator, rights, hazard, and normalized-handoff posture.
Append-only field-level review-state history document for deterministic record fields and claims.
Stable evidence locator/highlight document carrying span metadata, rights posture, quote eligibility, and public-safe redaction posture.
Append-only correction ledger documenting dedupe, merge, split, and supersession events over durable object refs with provenance and evidence references.
Append-only migration ledger documenting schema, artifact-contract, and rollback events with input/output versions and backup or snapshot references where relevant.
Machine-readable canonical graph model outline mapping current durable SQLite families into canonical record families and append-only sidecars.
Read-only source-adapter planning report describing candidate inputs or manifest entries, blockers, and emitted handoff records.
Normalized source-adapter handoff records emitted from a validated adapter plan without mutating source inputs.
Append-only scheduler planning records describing selected and skipped workspace decisions before any runner executes work.
Machine-readable validator report JSON emitted by local validators or schema/profile validation tools.
Read-only product/API view-model JSON emitted by local adapter tools.
Top-level JSON Schema contracts for read-only product/API view-model outputs.
Manifest for generated local product/API view-model fixture bundles.
Catalog of current product/API view-model schemas, emitters, fixtures, and validator commands.
Manifest-driven export profile declaring consumed fields, mappings, dropped fields, required validation profile, and expected lossiness.
Registry-controlled canonical work_type mappings to downstream serializer/source format hints.
Machine-readable rights and retention policy registry controlling raw-payload/full-text retention, public export visibility, quote eligibility, and discard/audit expectations.
Registry-controlled source relationship predicates with labels, inverses, evidence requirements, export behavior, review rules, and directionality.
Registry-controlled source claim types with evidence requirements, review rules, export visibility, examples, and confidence guidance.
Assistant-facing or operator-private handoff document retained for local continuity and excluded from public bundles by default.
Editable JSONL source-of-truth contract rows for the static pipeline registry.
SQLite schema defining the static pipeline registry tables and views.
Remote Git branch state affected by push-style helper scripts.
Local Git index and tracked-file state for the repository.
